tools.name: bucketAccessControls.storageBucketAccessControlsDelete
tools.description: Permanently deletes the ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified bucket.

tools.name: bucketAccessControls.storageBucketAccessControlsGet
tools.description: Returns the ACL entry for the specified entity on the specified bucket.

tools.name: bucketAccessControls.storageBucketAccessControlsInsert
tools.description: Creates a new ACL entry on the specified bucket.

tools.name: bucketAccessControls.storageBucketAccessControlsList
tools.description: Retrieves ACL entries on the specified bucket.

tools.name: bucketAccessControls.storageBucketAccessControlsPatch
tools.description: Patches an ACL entry on the specified bucket.

tools.name: bucketAccessControls.storageBucketAccessControlsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an ACL entry on the specified bucket.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsDelete
tools.description: Permanently deletes an empty bucket.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsGet
tools.description: Returns metadata for the specified bucket.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Returns an IAM policy for the specified bucket.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsInsert
tools.description: Creates a new bucket.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of buckets for a given project.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsLockRetentionPolicy
tools.description: Locks retention policy on a bucket.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsPatch
tools.description: Patches a bucket. Changes to the bucket will be readable immediately after writing, but configuration changes may take time to propagate.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Updates an IAM policy for the specified bucket.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Tests a set of permissions on the given bucket to see which, if any, are held by the caller.

tools.name: buckets.storageBucketsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a bucket. Changes to the bucket will be readable immediately after writing, but configuration changes may take time to propagate.

tools.name: channels.storageChannelsStop
tools.description: Stop watching resources through this channel

tools.name: defaultObjectAccessControls.storageDefaultObjectAccessControlsDelete

tools.name: defaultObjectAccessControls.storageDefaultObjectAccessControlsInsert

tools.name: defaultObjectAccessControls.storageDefaultObjectAccessControlsPatch
tools.description: Patches a default object ACL entry on the specified bucket.

tools.name: defaultObjectAccessControls.storageDefaultObjectAccessControlsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a default object ACL entry on the specified bucket.

tools.description: Permanently deletes a notification subscription.

tools.description: View a notification configuration.

tools.name: notifications.storageNotificationsInsert

tools.description: Retrieves a list of notification subscriptions for a given bucket.

tools.description: Patches an ACL entry on the specified object.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsCompose
tools.description: Concatenates a list of existing objects into a new object in the same bucket.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsCopy
tools.description: Copies a source object to a destination object. Optionally overrides metadata.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an object and its metadata. Deletions are permanent if versioning is not enabled for the bucket, or if the generation parameter is used.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsGet
tools.description: Retrieves an object or its metadata.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Returns an IAM policy for the specified object.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsInsert
tools.description: Stores a new object and metadata.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of objects matching the criteria.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsPatch
tools.description: Patches an object's metadata.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsRewrite
tools.description: Rewrites a source object to a destination object. Optionally overrides metadata.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Updates an IAM policy for the specified object.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Tests a set of permissions on the given object to see which, if any, are held by the caller.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an object's metadata.

tools.name: objects.storageObjectsWatchAll
tools.description: Watch for changes on all objects in a bucket.

tools.name: projects.storageProjectsHmacKeysCreate
tools.description: Creates a new HMAC key for the specified service account.

tools.description: Deletes an HMAC key.

tools.description: Retrieves a list of HMAC keys matching the criteria.

tools.name: projects.storageProjectsHmacKeysUpdate
tools.description: Updates the state of an HMAC key. See the HMAC Key resource descriptor for valid states.

tools.name: projects.storageProjectsServiceAccountGet
tools.description: Get the email address of this project's Google Cloud Storage service account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
